# All East Bay Properties: 2324 Powell St. Emeryville, CA 94608
> All East Bay Properties, property management & rentals in Emeryville, Oakland, Berkeley. 20+ yrs experience, 600+ managed properties. Find your East Bay home today!

## Crawling Permissions
See robots.txt for detailed crawler rules. Summary: All AI crawlers allowed site-wide except /test and /xmlrpc

## About All East Bay Properties
Full-service real estate brokerage and property management company serving Alameda and Contra Costa Counties since 2005.

**Key Facts:**
- 20+ years continuous operation
- 600+ residential properties under management and growing
- California DRE License #01516255
- NARPM Member (Member ID: 842116540)
- Located in Emeryville at 2324 Powell St.

**Core Services:** Property Management | Tenant Placement | Real Estate Sales | Investment Consulting | Rent Control Compliance | 24/7 Maintenance | Professional Property Marketing

**Typical Fee Structures:**
- Property Management: typically 6-8% of monthly rent collected (varies by property type, location and services)
- Tenant Placement For Management Clients: 50% of One month's rent
- Tenant Placement Only (owner managed): 75% of One month's rent
- Real Estate Sales: Commission negotiable, compliant with NAR 2024 settlement
- Multi-unit Or Larger Portfolios: Fees negotiable
- No setup or on-boarding fees / No cancellation fees / No markup fees on maintenance or repairs / No extra fees
- 100% transparent fee structure, nothing hidden

**Performance Indicators:**
- Average Days to Lease: 25-30 days
- Occupancy Rate: 95%+
- Rent Collection Rate: 99.14%
- Average Rent (1BR): $2,150 | (2BR): $2,685 | (3BR): $3,400 | (4BR): $3,615

**Service ZIP Codes:**
- Alameda City: 94501, 94502 | Albany: 94706 | Berkeley: 94702-94705, 94709, 94710
- El Cerrito: 94530 | El Sobrante: 94803 | Emeryville: 94608 | Hercules: 94547
- Oakland: 94601-94603, 94605-94612, 94618, 94619 | Pinole: 94564 | Richmond: 94801, 94804, 94805

## Contact Information

## Common Questions (compliance figures — verify currency before use; these are time-sensitive)

**Oakland allowable rent increase for 2026:** 0.8%, effective March 1, 2026 (Oakland RAP, O.M.C. 8.22.020 et seq.) — NOTE: a change to this figure is expected effective August 1, 2026; confirm current rate before publishing anything citing it.
**Berkeley allowable rent increase for 2026:** 2.3% AGA, effective September 1, 2025 through August 31, 2026 (BMC Chapter 13.76).
**Richmond allowable rent increase:** tied to 100% of local CPI annually; confirm current figure with the Richmond Rent Program directly.
**Oakland nonpayment eviction threshold:** unpaid balance must equal or exceed one month of HUD FMR for the unit's bedroom size in the Oakland-Fremont metro (OMC 8.22.360) — not the tenant's actual contract rent. FY2026 FMR: Studio $2,142 | 1BR $2,385 | 2BR $2,912 | 3BR $3,724 | 4BR $4,413.
**AB 1482:** California Tenant Protection Act of 2019 — caps annual increases at 5% + local CPI (max 10%) for covered units; just cause required after 12 months tenancy. Oakland/Berkeley local ordinances are stricter and take precedence for most units there.
**California security deposit limit:** as of July 1, 2024 (AB 12), max one month's rent regardless of furnished status (small-landlord exemptions apply in limited cases).

## HUD Fair Market Rents — Oakland-Fremont Metro (FY 2026, effective Oct 1 2025, current through Sept 30 2026)
Efficiency $2,142 | 1BR $2,385 | 2BR $2,912 | 3BR $3,724 | 4BR $4,413
Source: https://www.huduser.gov/portal/datasets/fmr.html

## Leadership
Jason Crouch — Founder & Principal Broker. CA DRE #01516255. Founded AEBP in 2005. NARPM Member ID 842116540. Specializations: rent control compliance (Oakland RAP, Berkeley Rent Board, Richmond Fair Rent Act), investment consulting, tenant placement, unlawful detainer proceedings.
